description: General OS performance metrics to assess the availability and performance of Linux and Windows systems. Leverages OpenTelemetry metrics collected with MetricsHub and stored in Prometheus.

sourceQuery.query: severity:CRITICAL AND status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND metric_name.keyword:system*
status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND severity:CRITICAL AND metric_name.keyword:system*
status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND severity:MAJOR AND metric_name.keyword:system*
status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND severity:MINOR AND metric_name.keyword:system*
(severity:CRITICAL OR severity:MAJOR OR severity:MINOR) AND status:OPEN AND metric_name.keyword:system*
severity:MAJOR AND status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND metric_name.keyword:system*

sourceQuery.expr: 100 * count by (os.type) (group by (host.name, os.type) (system.uptime)) / scalar(count(count by (host.name) (system.uptime)))

sourceQuery.query: severity:MINOR AND status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND metric_name.keyword:system*

sourceQuery.expr:
(
  # Case 1: Ping is down for the host
  (max by (host.name) (metricshub.host.up{protocol="ping"} == 0)) - 1
  or
  # Case 2: Ping is up → Show response time
  (max by (host.name) (metricshub.host.up{protocol="ping"} == 1))
  * on(host.name)
  (max by (host.name) (metricshub.host.response_time{protocol="ping"}) * 1000)
)

sourceQuery.query: status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND severity:CRITICAL AND metric_name.keyword:system*
status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND severity:MAJOR AND metric_name.keyword:system*
status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND severity:MINOR AND metric_name.keyword:system*

sourceQuery.expr:
label_join(
  sum by (host.name, system.device) (
    system.filesystem.utilization{system.filesystem.state=~"used|reserved", system.filesystem.type!~"$filesystemFilter"}),
  "id", ":", "host.name", "system.device"
)
-
label_join(
  sum by (host.name, system.device) (
    system.filesystem.utilization{system.filesystem.state=~"used|reserved", system.filesystem.type!~"$filesystemFilter"} offset $__range
  ),
  "id", ":", "host.name", "system.device"
)

topk(5,
  max by (host.name, network.interface.name) (rate(system.network.io[$__range])) / on(host.name, network.interface.name)
  max by (host.name, network.interface.name) (system.network.bandwidth.limit)
)

list.description: Excludes all filesystems whose type matches the specified regular expression
list.label: Exclude Filesystem Types
list.name: filesystemFilter

title: System Performance Metrics - Overview (MetricsHub)
